A sexy, dramatic thriller about interconnected romantic life in the 21st century.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: The story of New Zealander Burt Munro, who spent years building a 1920 Indian motorcycle -- a bike which helped him set the land-speed world record at Utah's Bonneville Salt Flats in 1967.

programme.title: I Give It A Year
programme.desc: Since they met at a party, ambitious high-flyer Nat and struggling novelist Josh have been deliriously happy despite their differences.

programme.title: Two Lovers
programme.desc: After falling for two very different women in quick succession, a bachelor struggles deciding who he loves.

programme.title: Ondine
programme.desc: A fisherman (Colin Farrell) hauls in an unexpected catch when a beautiful and mysterious woman gets tangled in his nets, in this charming and thrilling romance about fairy tales colliding with real life.

programme.title: Prince Avalanche
programme.desc: Alvin and Lance leave the city to repaint traffic lines and develop an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Fay Grim
programme.desc: A single mother from Queens becomes unwittingly embroiled in international espionage.

programme.title: Riders of Justice
programme.desc: Recently deployed Markus returns home to care for his daughter after his wife is killed in an accident. But, Markus begins to suspect his wife was murdered and embarks on a mission of revenge.

programme.title: Bronson
programme.desc: In 1974, a misguided 19 year old named Michael Peterson decided he wanted to make a name for himself and so, he attempted to rob a post office.

programme.title: Four Lions
programme.desc: A group of British jihadists push their abstract dreams of glory to the breaking point.

programme.title: Main Street
programme.desc: MAIN STREET is a contemporary drama about residents of a small Southern city whose lives are changed by the arrival of a stranger with a controversial plan to save their decaying hometown.

programme.title: Humpday
programme.desc: It's been a decade since Ben (Duplass) and Andrew (Leonard) were the bad boys of their college campus. Ben has settled down and found a job, wife, and home.

programme.title: Barry Munday
programme.desc: Barry is s missing his family jewels. To make matters worse, he learns he's facing a paternity lawsuit.

programme.title: 2 Days In New York
programme.desc: When Marion's family visits, she's unaware that her boyfriend and familay will make up for an explosive mix.

programme.title: Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Steve Coogan reprises his most popular role as the iconic Alan Partridge, the famous local radio DJ and one time talk show host.

programme.title: The Protector 2
programme.desc: When Boss Suchart is murdered, all evidence points to KHAM (Tony Jaa).

programme.title: Sushi Girl
programme.desc: Fish is released from jail and the men he protected celebrate with dinner.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Recently divorced, newly rich, and utterly miserable, Danny [Kevin Corrigan] would seem to be the perfect test subject for a definitive look at the relationship between money and happiness.

programme.title: Frank
programme.desc: Frank is genius rock musician who never removes his giant fake head. Things get rocky between his bandmates Clara and Jon, who is convinced they’re meant for stardom.

programme.title: Best Man Down
programme.desc: The best man dies at the wedding and the bride and groom end up on an adventure planning his funeral.

programme.title: Broken English
programme.desc: A thirty-something meets a Frenchman who shows her just what an amazing place the world can truly be.

programme.title: The Good Heart
programme.desc: Brian Cox stars as Jacques, the curmudgeonly owner of a gritty New York dive bar that serves as home to a motley assortment of professional drinkers.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: Wendy is a brilliant young woman with autism. She sneaks out of her group home to submit her script on-time for a screenplay competition not letting anything stop her from achieving her goals.

programme.title: Italian Studies
programme.desc: After a writer (Academy Award®-nominee Vanessa Kirby) loses her memory, she finds herself on the streets of New York City. She connects with a group of teenagers — in conversations both real and imagined — searching for a way home.

programme.title: Frontera
programme.desc: Miguel crosses the Arizona-Mexican border illegally and is accused of murdering the wife of a former sheriff. His pregnant wife gets involved with Mexican smugglers trying to help him.

programme.title: Bloodmoney
programme.desc: Un cartel de la drogue colombien s'associe à un groupe de triades de Hong Kong et au tueur à gages le plus chaud de la planète, pour expédier deux tonnes de cocaïne en Australie et en Chine.

programme.title: Zombeavers
programme.desc: Un groupe d’adolescents en vacances au bord d’une rivière se retrouve menacé par une horde de castors zombies. Le weekend de débauche va rapidement tourner à la catastrophe pour les jeunes. Pour rester en vie, ils vont devoir se confronter aux castors zombies qui les attaquent dans leurs propres cabines...

programme.title: Fatal Instinct
programme.desc: Un détective de police suit une piste d'indices qui semble finalement mener au frère ex-détenu de son partenaire de confiance, qu'il a aidé à mettre en prison il y a des années.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond est un blanchisseur d'argent à New York qui se réveille sans aucun souvenir, avec des millions de dollars en espèces volées et de la drogue. Il doit rapidement parcourir les rues à la recherche de réponses tout en essayant d'échapper à une équipe de policiers violents et corrompus.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: Londres, 2024. Les drogues, devenues légales à la fabrication et à la consommation, sont contrôlées et exploitées par des sociétés pharmaceutiques. Mais un marché noir de substances bien plus dangereuses encore existe. Frank Grieves, agent de police faisant partie d’une unité d’élite chargée de lutter contre ce trafic, doit enquêter sur une affaire de corps non identifié. Il va devoir faire face à toute une organisation corrompue et ultra puissante.

programme.title: Desert Strike
programme.desc: Un ancien militaire au passé mystérieux conduit un groupe de réfugiés égyptiens à travers le désert et doit les protéger d'un groupe de mercenaires diaboliques.

programme.title: Fugitive Mind
programme.desc: Un homme découvre qu'on lui a fait subir un lavage de cerveau pour qu'il tue un important représentant du gouvernement.

programme.title: La Prison
programme.desc: UN ANCIEN POLICIER CONDAMNÉ REJOINT UN SYNDICAT DU CRIME SECRET AU SEIN DE LA PRISONYu-gon (KIM Rae-won), ancien inspecteur de police tourmenté, est incarcéré pour un délit de fuite. En prison, il découvre que tout l’établissement est contrôlé par un détenu nommé Ik-ho (HAN Seok-kyu), qui dirige un syndicat du crime avec l’aide du directeur et des gardiens, leur fournissant ainsi l’alibi parfait. Rapidement, Yu-gon devient un membre clé de l’empire criminel d’Ik-ho.

programme.title: Alpha Rift
programme.desc: Lorsqu'un casque magique emmène Nolan Parthmore dans un monde de chevaliers modernes combattant le mal surnaturel, il est obligé de devenir le héros qu'il était destiné à être.

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Six ans après l'invasion de la Terre par les extraterrestres, un journaliste désabusé accepte d'escorter une touriste américaine choquée depuis une zone infectée au Mexique jusqu'à la sécurité de la frontière américaine.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: Après l'explosion d'une météorite, une terrible contamination se produit dans une ville isolée en Alaska, ce qui provoque la mort de tous les êtres vivants dans les alentours.

programme.title: Le Jour de La Colère
programme.desc: Espagne, au XVIe siècle pendant l'Inquisition. Une série de meurtres particuliers secoue le pays. Le shérif Ruy de Mendoza mène l'enquête...

programme.title: A Battle of Wits
programme.desc: L'histoire est centrée sur une bataille qui s'est déroulée pendant la période des États combattants en Chine, une série de guerres civiles qui s'est étendue du 5e au 3e siècle avant J.-C. Basée sur un manga japonais populaire, elle était elle-même basée sur un roman japonais inspiré de l'histoire des États combattants en Chine

programme.title: A Battle of Wits
programme.desc: L'histoire est centrée sur une bataille qui s'est déroulée pendant la période des États combattants en Chine, une série de guerres civiles qui s'est étendue du 5e au 3e siècle avant J.-C. Basée sur un manga japonais populaire, elle était elle-même basée sur un roman japonais inspiré de l'histoire des États combattants en Chine

programme.title: Erik le Viking (VOST FR)
programme.desc: Le chef viking Thorvald meurt d'une blessure mortelle au combat. Il se rend compte que son fils Erloff n'est pas un digne successeur, mais son testament répartit ses biens à parts égales entre lui et Erik, le valeureux fils de sa sœur, qui reçoit également ses armes et la mission de mener une expédition maritime à la recherche de nouvelles terres pour y établir une colonie, cruciale car leur village natal scandinave ne pourra pas résister à la puissance du royaume danois.

programme.title: Flammes sur la ville
programme.desc: Scott Daniels, ingénieur de la ville de Millwood, venu de Houston, enquête sur une série d'incendies mystérieux. Jesse, le fils unique de Scott et Lourie Harper, qui a détesté le déménagement ou la maison de jeunesse de son père, simule une fièvre et invite sa nouvelle petite amie Carmen.

programme.title: King Rising 3
programme.desc: Dominic Purcell se transforme d’un tueur à gages moderne en guerrier médiéval dans cette aventure pleine d’action inspirée de la série de jeux vidéo Dungeon Siege. Découvrez des effets spéciaux époustouflants qui donnent vie à une action ininterrompue. Un tueur à gages est transporté au Moyen Âge, où il doit affronter une armée gigantesque – et un dragon cracheur de feu – dans une bataille acharnée pour survivre !

programme.title: Funeral Killers
programme.desc: Un jeu du chat et de la souris se déroule au cours d'une seule nuit, lorsque trois criminels armés font irruption dans une morgue et exigent que le médecin légiste et son assistant leur remettent une balle logée dans un cadavre. Alors que les criminels tentent désespérément de cacher leur véritable identité, le médecin se retrouve de plus en plus enlisé dans un bourbier, son passé le rattrapant malgré lui. Chaque rebondissement explosif pousse bientôt les personnages au-delà de leurs limites.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: Une souche mutante de piranhas géants et féroces s'échappe de l'Amazonie et se dirige vers la Floride.

programme.title: Swarmed
programme.desc: Les habitants d'une petite ville se retrouvent aux prises avec un essaim de frelons qui a été pulvérisé par un super pesticide.

programme.title: Manipulation Criminelle
programme.desc: Theo Abrams est un ancien pompier du Cap souffrant d'un grave syndrome de stress post-traumatique, incapable de reprendre le travail en raison du traumatisme psychologique subi lors d'une mission de sauvetage qui a mal tourné. De plus en plus frustré et instable, Theo voit son monde basculer lorsqu'un matin, il se réveille à côté du cadavre de sa femme, sans aucun souvenir de ce qui s'est passé et avec toutes les preuves suggérant qu'il l'a tuée.

programme.title: Battle Drone
programme.desc: 6 mercenaires sont engagés par la CIA pour enlever l'héritier d'une république et éliminer un marchand d'armes à Moscou et reçoivent une autre mission à Tchernobyl où la trahison les attend.

programme.title: Yeti : Terreur en Montagne
programme.desc: Des amis partent à l'aventure dans la neige et tombent nez à nez avec une créature mortelle.

programme.title: Triple Action
programme.desc: Une mercenaire sexy et mortelle s'attaque à un syndicat international de trafiquants d'armes dirigé par la mafia russe.

programme.title: Dystopia
programme.desc: Nous sommes en 2037. Notre monde se meurt lentement d'un virus qui a rendu l'humanité stérile. Aucun enfant n'est né depuis 25 ans. Les gouvernements sont devenus les marionnettes impuissantes des plus grandes entreprises et Biocorp, la plus grande du monde, ne cesse de promettre un remède qui ne viendra jamais

programme.title: La Prison
programme.desc: UN ANCIEN POLICIER CONDAMNÉ REJOINT UN SYNDICAT DU CRIME SECRET AU SEIN DE LA PRISONYu-gon (KIM Rae-won), ancien inspecteur de police tourmenté, est incarcéré pour un délit de fuite. En prison, il découvre que tout l’établissement est contrôlé par un détenu nommé Ik-ho (HAN Seok-kyu), qui dirige un syndicat du crime avec l’aide du directeur et des gardiens, leur fournissant ainsi l’alibi parfait. Rapidement, Yu-gon devient un membre clé de l’empire criminel d’Ik-ho.

programme.title: Play the Devil
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of Trinidad and Tobago's mystical Carnival, a gifted and struggling young man becomes the object of intrigue for an older, well-meaning businessman until their worlds collide.

programme.title: The Falls: Covenant of Grace
programme.desc: This third and final film of the Falls trilogy revisits former Mormon missionaries Chris and RJ, six years after they first fell in love and were disciplined for it, as they formulate a plan to be together at long last.

programme.title: Les Pirates du Mississipi
programme.desc: Un groupe de pirates menés par Kelly, un bandit habillé tout en noir, sème la terreur en s'en prenant aux habitants de Helena et aux bateaux postiers sur le Mississippi. Le shérif James Lively doit aller contre la méfiance des habitants mais aussi des Indiens. Mais avec l'aide des Cherokees, car les bandits se sont établis sur leurs terres, et de son adjoint Tom Quincy, il parvient à mettre fin à leurs méfaits.

programme.title: Les Femmes de Jesse James
programme.desc: Jesse James est tellement occupé à courir les jupons que sa carrière de hors-la-loi commence à en pâtir.

programme.title: Les couleurs du désert
programme.desc: Deux hommes trouvent un bébé abandonné et se disputent la propriété de l'enfant, ce qui entraîne une rivalité à vie.

programme.title: Daniel Boone
programme.desc: Daniel Boone conduit des colons dans le Kentucky, mais il doit affronter les Indiens Shawnee qui ont été persuadés par un renégat français que Boone et les colons sont là pour les tuer et leur voler leurs terres.

programme.title: Le temps du massacre
programme.desc: Un chercheur d'or et son demi-frère ivrogne doivent affronter un fermier et son fils sadique après avoir pris le contrôle de sa ferme.

programme.title: Le Rocher du Diable
programme.desc: Deux vieux amis se retrouvent dans des camps opposés pendant la guerre civile lors d'une bataille désespérée au sommet d'une montagne imprenable.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss se laisse séduire par une belle femme accro au jeu et refuse de croire qu'elle n'est intéressée que par son argent, malgré les preuves du contraire apportées par Adam.

programme.title: Django Kill... Tire encore si tu peux
programme.desc: Diverses factions, dont un bandit métis, une bande de cow-boys homosexuels et un prêtre, se disputent l'or volé dans une ville surréaliste.

programme.title: Le dernier des Apaches
programme.desc: Une bande de cow-boys sadiques ne laisse rien s'opposer à leur quête d'or.

programme.title: Amigo!... Mon colt a deux mots à te dire
programme.desc: Un vagabond aux poings rapides et un proxénète armé de pistolets rapides aident un enfant à réclamer son héritage.

programme.title: Retour a Legend City
programme.desc: Enfant, il a vu son père prédicateur se faire assassiner. En tant que soldat, il a été témoin des horreurs de la guerre civile. Aujourd'hui, le chasseur de primes James Conners est de retour à Legend, au Nouveau-Mexique, pour capturer le baron terrien psychotique qui a détruit son enfance.

programme.title: Hey amigo... tu es mort !
programme.desc: Dove Williams, un agent des postes, poursuit un groupe de hors-la-loi qui ont dévalisé une diligence au Texas.

programme.title: Le temps du massacre
programme.desc: Un chercheur d'or et son demi-frère ivrogne doivent affronter un fermier et son fils sadique après avoir pris le contrôle de sa ferme.

programme.title: Catherine de Russie
programme.desc: Caterina découvre que son mari, Pierre Tzar de Russie, complote pour la tuer. Elle libère le comte Orlov, ennemi juré de Pierre, devient impératrice de Russie et mène l'armée des Cosaques contre lui.

programme.title: Au-delà de la haine
programme.desc: Une famille de pionniers est presque entièrement détruite par des Indiens en quête de vengeance : Le petit George est laissé évanoui sur le sol, et sa petite sœur adoptée par le chef indien. Le destin les réunira à nouveau.

programme.title: Au-delà de la haine
programme.desc: Une famille de pionniers est presque entièrement détruite par des Indiens en quête de vengeance : Le petit George est laissé évanoui sur le sol, et sa petite sœur adoptée par le chef indien. Le destin les réunira à nouveau.

programme.title: On continue à l'appeller Trinita
programme.desc: Bambino essaie d'apprendre à son frère Trinity comment devenir un hors-la-loi, mais ils finissent par sauver une famille de pionniers et à défaire un réseau de contrebande.

programme.title: On m'appelle King
programme.desc: Un chasseur de primes traque une bande de trafiquants d'armes à travers la frontière mexicaine.

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: Un capitaine de cavalerie a beaucoup de mal à maintenir la paix entre son colonel tyrannique et un chef indien déterminé à se venger.

programme.title: Vengeance aux deux visages
programme.desc: Après avoir braqué une banque mexicaine, Dad Longworth s'empare du butin et laisse son complice Rio se faire capturer, mais Rio s'échappe et part à la recherche de Dad en Californie.

programme.title: Le justicier de Dieu
programme.desc: Un ancien tireur devenu prêtre cherche à se venger de trois bandits qui se font passer pour des citoyens respectueux de la loi.

programme.title: Route mystérieuse
programme.desc: Un détective aborigène retourne dans l'Outback australien pour enquêter sur le meurtre d'une jeune fille.

programme.title: Je vais... je tire... et je reviens
programme.desc: Un gang dérobe une cargaison d'or dans un train. Un soi-disant chasseur de primes est envoyé à la recherche des voleurs et décide de les laisser le conduire jusqu'à l'or.

programme.title: Macho Callaghan se déchaîne
programme.desc: Un tireur solitaire traque les membres d'un gang de hors-la-loi qui a tué ses amis.

programme.title: Les Impitoyables
programme.desc: Un prêtre et son frère jumeau se relaient pour défendre une petite ville contre le gang vicieux des Clayton.

programme.title: Le pistolero de Tombstone
programme.desc: Un homme est faussement accusé de vol de banque, ce qui pousse son frère à le faire sortir de prison. Ensemble, ils partent à la recherche des vrais coupables et leur quête les mène à une bande de hors-la-loi dirigée par un célèbre bandit armé.

programme.title: Amigo!... Mon colt a deux mots à te dire
programme.desc: Un vagabond aux poings rapides et un proxénète armé de pistolets rapides aident un enfant à réclamer son héritage.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: Après que ses mains ont été mutilées par son ancien élève lors d'un vol de train, un tireur d'élite entraîne un jeune homme accusé du crime afin qu'ils puissent se venger.

programme.title: Hercule contre les tyrans de Babylone
programme.desc: Le roi Shalmaneser, Assur et sa sœur sorcière Tanit, tyrans de Babylone, retiennent prisonniers des Hellènes, dont Esperia, reine d'Hellas. Hercule intervient pour la sauver, punir les tyrans cruels et libérer le peuple.

programme.desc: (3/4) Davros has awoken from his centuries long slumber and is taken prisoner by the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Destiny of the Daleks
programme.desc: (4/4) The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: (1/4) Silent but deadly androids are protecting a bomb buried beneath the Earth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: (2/4) With her crew slowly vanishing, Briggs assumes the Doctor to be the guilty party.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: (3/4) The Cybermen are released from their silos and on the march.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Earthshock

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Revenge of the Cybermen

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Revenge of the Cybermen
programme.desc: (3/4) The Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Revenge of the Cybermen
programme.desc: (4/4) Their plan to blow up Voga thwarted, the Cybermen intend to crash Nerva into the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: (3/6) The Doctor and Sarah track down the remaining Krynoid pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: (5/6) The Krynoid demands that the Doctor be surrendered to it.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: (6/6) The Doctor, Sarah and Scorby are hunted down by the mad Harrison Chase.

programme.desc: (1/4) The Doctor discovers archaeologists trying to find the lost tombs of the Cybermen.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: (2/4) The Doctor and archaeologists discover the city of Telos isn't as dead as they assumed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: Trapped in the tombs, the Cybermen release their poisonous pets, Cybermats.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Tomb of the Cybermen
programme.desc: (4/4) How will the Doctor rid Telos of Cybermen once and for all?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: When Sir Reginald Styles claims to have seen a ghost, UNIT is called in.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor learns of a plot to change history and Jo is transported to the 22nd Century.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in a future where Earth is ruled by the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Daleks travel back in time to ensure that the peace conference fails.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: (1/4) In Shoreditch, 1963, the Doctors past begins to catch up with him.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: (2/4) Renegade Daleks battle Imperial Daleks for control of the Hand of Omega.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: Renegade Daleks battle Imperial Daleks for control of the Hand of Omega.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: (3/4) The Doctor discovers the difference between the two Dalek factions.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Remembrance of the Daleks
programme.desc: (4/4) The streets of East London shake under a civil war between the Daleks.

programme.desc: (1/6) Ian and Vicki are trapped by tentacled creatures on the planet Aridius.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: (2/6) The Doctor and his friends have been given shelter from the Daleks by the Aridians.

programme.desc: (4/4) Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Jimmy O. Yang: Good Deal
programme.desc: From the Neptune Theater in Seattle, the comic talks about his interactions with immigrant parents, gives his thoughts on Matt Damon and asks whether ghosts are likely to haunt one-bedroom apartments.

programme.title: Aries Spears: Comedy Blueprint
programme.desc: Armed with his ferociously aggressive style of comedy, MADTV alum Aries Spears takes the stage in Philadelphia for 'Comedy Blueprint.' No one - not black, not white, not gay, not straight - is safe from his jokes and impressions.

programme.title: David Cross: Oh Come On
programme.desc: David Cross shares laughter, tears and salty language in this standup special.

programme.title: Erica Rhodes: I Love You More
programme.desc: Erica Rhodes has made various stage appearances.

programme.title: Greg Fitzsimmons: Life on Stage
programme.desc: Greg Fitzsimmons discusses the joys of life as a baby; how to get a man to do anything you want; an explanation of how we flaunt our good fortune as a nation through water parks.

programme.title: Sam Tallent: Waiting for Death to Claim Us
programme.desc: Follows stand-up scion Sam Tallent through 13 different venues across the US from sold-out theaters to house parties and rib-joints, all the while COVID barrels down on the nation in early 2020.

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: Livin The Dream
programme.desc: Famed Latino comedian and voiceover artist Jeff Garcia performs his signature improv style at San Manuel Indian Bingo and Casino. He comments on his family, unreliable cars, white people, marriage and his run-ins with the law.

programme.title: Kim McVicar: Please Notice Me
programme.desc: Comedian and former backup dancer Kim McVicar pokes fun at her life.

programme.title: Gregg Rogell: Balloon Animals
programme.desc: Gregg Rogell, the master of the slow burn, twists and stretches modern life in a comedic journey.

programme.title: Jay Mohr: American Treasure
programme.desc: Comedian Jay Mohr shares hilarious observations and personal glimpses into his life.

programme.title: Andy Woodhull: World's Greatest Stepdad
programme.desc: This special premiered on Comedy Central after an appearance on Conan.

programme.title: Bryan Callen: Man Class
programme.desc: The comic discusses being a male of the species in the 21st century.

programme.title: Bryan Callen: Never Grow Up
programme.desc: The comic performs.

programme.title: Godfrey: Regular Black
programme.desc: The comic performs in his hometown of Chicago.

programme.title: Zarna Garg: One in a Billion
programme.desc: Zarna, an Indian-Immigrant mom, has plenty to joke about.

programme.title: Sinbad: Make Me Wanna Holla
programme.desc: Comic Sinbad discusses the life advice his family gave him; why he's tired of people with no talent having clothing lines; who he really is.

programme.title: Sinbad: Where U Been?
programme.desc: The comic performs at the Club Nokia Theatre in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: I'm Not Fat... I'm Fluffy
programme.desc: The comic known for wearing his signature Hawaiian shirts covers everything from his fondness for Paul Rodriguez to his own "fluffiness."

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Hot and Fluffy
programme.desc: Filmed at the Fox Theater in Bakersfield, California the comedian and well-known favorite to television viewers as being on "Last Comic Standing," performs impressions and silly voices.

programme.title: Gabriel Iglesias: Aloha Fluffy
programme.desc: The comic discusses his crazy world of family, friends, and world travels.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: The Pale Tourist - Canadian American
programme.desc: Jim Gaffigan performs in Canada and has some very strong opinions on poutine, Saskatchewan, health care and the pronunciation of the city of Regina.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape
programme.desc: Comic Jim Gaffigan proves that laughter is the best medicine when he talks about a family medical crisis and other topics during his hilarious stand-up routine.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape
programme.desc: Comic Jim Gaffigan proves that laughter is the best medicine when he talks about a family medical crisis and other topics during his hilarious stand-up routine.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham returns with new ventriloquist characters by starting off with the infamously known Walter, scrutinizing every bit of today's American society.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Unhinged in Hollywood
programme.desc: Previously unseen stand-up comedy by Jeff Dunham; sketches that include popular characters; Brad Paisley performs; special appearances by comic Chris Parnell and former UFC champion Chuck Liddell.

programme.title: Jeff Garcia: Low Budget Madness
programme.desc: The comic performs.

programme.title: James Gregory: Food is Not Fatal
programme.desc: James Gregory performs standup.

programme.title: Jeff Allen: Honor Thy Wife
programme.desc: Jeff Allen, an entertainer, presents a hilarious stand-up comedy act focused on married life.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: Freezing Hot
programme.desc: Smart and brazen comedian Iliza Shlesinger applies her fresh perspective to the universal struggles between men and women.

programme.title: Daniel Webb: Hoe's Parade Live at The Rose Bowl
programme.desc: Daniel proudly makes world history as the first queer gay man to perform stand-up comedy live at the Rose Bowl.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: This last year has been unlike any other: COVID, lockdowns, and for Gary, it has also included a divorce and family insanity unlike any other; up until now, Gary hasn't been able to speak about what really happened.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: Comic Gary Owen discusses his history of growing up in and around trailer parks during a live performance.

programme.title: Gary Owen: #DoinWhatIDo
programme.desc: Comic Gary Owen bridges the lanes of black and white cultures as only he can, both in his home and on social media.

programme.title: Jay Mohr: Altamont
programme.desc: Comic Jay Mohr tackles subjects ranging from unexpected visitors to bringing up children and working with Chris Farley on "Saturday Night Live."

programme.title: Jay Mohr: American Treasure
programme.desc: Comedian Jay Mohr shares hilarious observations and personal glimpses into his life.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Lil Rel Howery: Relevent
programme.desc: Comic LilRel Howery explains how he found out that his father wasn't a doctor; the difference between raising a son and a daughter; racism within the black community.

programme.title: Kylie Brakeman: Linda Hollywood's Big Night
programme.desc: Character comedian Kylie Brakeman teaches an acting masterclass as Linda Hollywood, a problematic, old school talent agent on a mission to spread her industry wisdom-and save her own career in the process.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Minding the Monsters
programme.desc: In the spirit of Halloween, Jeff Dunham performs with his special cast of characters including Walter, Bubba J, Peanut, Jose and Achmed all decked out in their Halloween best.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: All Over the Map
programme.desc: Comic and ventriloquist Jeff Dunham performs across five continents, accompanied by his well-known characters, Achmed the Dead Terrorist, Peanut, Jose Jalapeno, Bubba J and Walter.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Arguing With Myself
programme.desc: The comic who has helped reintroduce the lost art of ventriloquism entertains a live audience with a little assistance from three inanimate friends who aren't nearly as wooden as their outer facades may lead you to believe.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: Ventriloquist and stand-up comedian Jeff Dunham performs an all-Valentine's Day-themed special.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: A live concert performance that leans heavily on three favorite characters; cranky old man Walter, Achmed the Dead Terrorist, the mischievous purple whatzit and Peanut.

programme.title: Tom Segura: Completely Normal
programme.desc: Comedian Tom Segura opens up about hotels, his hobbies and digestive ailments.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering services is not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to an assault call which escalates to car chase and the eventual arrest of two suspects. Officers spot a known drug dealer who uses a troubling method to conceal his narcotics. An officer curbs a heckler outside a popular bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man attacking a woman is tackled by an officer. A vehicle is pulled over for a drug deal in progress. A woman smashes a car window with a pipe in a fit of road rage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A bio-hazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer attempts to pull over a man on a bicycle who refuses to stop. An officer arrests two suspects involved in a drug deal who attempt to discard the evidence. An officer questions a driver leaving a known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An after hours search of a park turns up a young couple in a porta potty. An extremely combative man refuses to surrender. A heated argument between best friends catches the attention of the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer arrests a driver who attempts to swallow drugs stashed in his mouth. An officer arrests a repeated drug offender in an area notorious for drug trafficking. An officer pulls over an unlicensed woman driver who is arrested for providing falsified identification.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren’t his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an AK-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An attempted pull over results in a foot chase and eventual arrest. An officer makes a drug-related arrest during a routine traffic stop. An officer makes a sizeable drug seizure during a field sobriety check.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife’s boyfriend’s car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to a couple arguing on the street. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A repeat offender in Las Vegas attempts an ambitious vertical escape. An officer investigates a domestic call involving an armed male suspect. A driver concealing drugs in his mouth eventually swallows the crack cocaine, but comes clean about his possession.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high speed chase comes to a halt in a residential area and the driver is taken in for sobriety testing. A suspicious vehicle takes off as an officer approaches and a high speed chase ensues. An officer pulls over a vehicle belonging to a battery suspect who attempts to eat evidence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from Deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by Deputies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops. A young couple tell deputies conflicting stories.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood ‘Old West’ style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car. A driver comes clean to a deputy during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A group of suspects race a stolen SUV through a residential neighborhood. A drunk man has a kitchen knife and a listening problem. Two usual suspects are going back to jail for their latest escapades.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a drug bust when cops turn up evidence of the driver's sizable habit. A suspicious man waiting in a parked car can't explain the incriminating texts on his phone. Two frequent flyers give officers a hard time when pulled over in a well-known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: During a routine traffice stop, an officer witnesses a cyclist get hit by a motorist. An officer investigates a domestic disturbance call involving some spousal infidelity. Authorities respond to a tip regarding a heavy weight drug dealer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a vehicular pursuit involving a narcotics suspect. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving a mother, daughter and the mother’s new husband to be. An officer makes an arrest in a stolen SUV case.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Instead of facing the music, a suspect flees from officers down an embankment. A suspect takes a walk through the neighborhood with a BB gun. A innocent pedestrian gets more than she bargained for when she’s hit in a two vehicle collision.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers get more than they expected when they stop a cyclist and discover a deadly weapon. Four sons attempt to break into the family home after being banned. A homeowner claims he accidently fired five shots while cleaning a gun.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A stealthy robbery suspect leads officers on a chase through backyards. After dropping a bag of meth, a man swears he’s only seen the drug on TV. A doped-up domestic violence suspect tries to claim self-defense.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An elderly woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles on the side of the road.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are forced to taze a suicidal man for his own good. A familiar face makes cops chase him through a grass field. No lie is too big for a suspect who seeks refuge in a condemned house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he is outnumbered. A man gets more than he bargained for when he tries to assist his neighbor. A husband and wife are separated after deputies search their vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a convenience store.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Geniale Zufälle
programme.desc: Ein gescheitertes Blutdruckmedikament und unerwartet starker Haarwuchs bei einer Frau führen zu einem Mittel gegen Glatzen. Ein Versuch, das Kräuseln des Papiers in einem Zeitungsdrucker zu verhindern, beschert uns die Klimaanlage. Und auch Wilhelm Röntgen wurde bei seiner größten Erfindung vom Zufall unterstützt.

programme.title: Jede Sekunde zählt - Notärzte im Einsatz
programme.desc: Die Teams von Notärzten und Rettungsassistenten sind perfekt aufeinander eingespielt: Sie müssen schnell sein, effektiv handeln und die Lage vor Ort mit einem Blick erfassen. Wir haben die verantwortungsvolle und oft dramatische Arbeit von zwei Marburger Notarztteams mehrere Wochen lang beobachtet.

programme.title: Die Bergretter - Rettung im Tiefschnee
programme.desc: Hoch über den Alpen thront der Gipfel des Mont Blanc. Doch seine atemberaubende Schönheit hat auch eine dunkle und tödliche Seite. Denn die steilen Abhänge, das tückische Eis und die versteckten Felsspalten werden immer wieder jenen zum Verhängnis, die den Nervenkitzel am Steilhang suchen. Wenn die Helikopter-Staffel der Bergretter vom Mont Blanc ausrückt, dann geht es fast immer um Leben und Tod.

programme.title: Emergency Room Essen
programme.desc: Im größten Krankenhaus des Ruhrgebiets herrscht fast immer Ausnahmezustand. 24 Stunden täglich, an 365 Tagen im Jahr. Pausen gibt es für die Ärzte während ihrer langen Schichten kaum, auch weil immer häufiger Menschen mit kleinen Wehwehchen zu ihnen kommen. Sie wollen die Wartezeiten bei ihren Hausärzten umgehen. Die Folge: Mediziner und Pfleger sind am Limit.

programme.title: Emergency Room Essen
programme.desc: Wenn am Wochenende die Hausarztpraxen geschlossen sind, geht es hoch her in der Notaufnahme des Uniklinikums Essen. Patienten mit Verdacht auf Herzinfarkt, Schlaganfall oder andere lebensbedrohliche Krankheiten, werden sofort behandelt. Doch wer mit Husten, Schnupfen, Heiserkeit oder sonstigen Lappalien kommt, muss sich erstmal hintenanstellen. Wartezeit: manchmal über sieben Stunden.

programme.title: Ein Lächeln für Manila
programme.desc: Es ist heiß im provisorischen Operationssaal in Manila, die Außentemperaturen liegen bei 40 Grad Celsius. Im Akkord werden gerade an drei Tischen Kinder gleichzeitig operiert. Seit 20 Jahren reist der plastische Chirurg Christopher Wachsmuth in seinem Jahresurlaub auf die Philippinen, um Kinder mit einer Lippen-Kiefer-Gaumenspalte zu operieren.

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: Für Neurochirurg Prof. Peter Vajkoczy steht eine komplizierte Operation an: eine Patientin mit einem Hypophysentumor. Beim Eingriff wendet der Hirnspezialist eine besondere Methode an. Er operiert durch die Nase der Patientin und vermeidet damit eine Öffnung des Schädels. Navena Widulin hütet den medizinhistorischen Schatz der Charité: die Präparatesammlung.

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: An den geburtsmedizinischen Kliniken der Charite kommen jährlich rund 4600 Kinder zur Welt. Die Ärzte sind spezialisiert auf schwierige Fälle. Vor drei Jahren gelang dem Charite-Team eine Sensation: zum ersten Mal seit zwanzig Jahren in Deutschland wurden hier Sechslinge geboren.

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: Prof. Henrich steht ein besonderer Kaiserschnitt bevor: eine 31-jährige erwartet Drillinge. Ein Team von rund 20 Ärzten und Schwestern ist bereit, um den Frühgeborenen sicher auf die Welt zu helfen. In der Abteilung von Professor Schaser steht ebenfalls eine aufwändige OP an. Einem 36-jährigen Unfallopfer wird ein Titangerüst in den Oberschenkel operiert.

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: Neurochirurg Professor Vajkoczy operiert jeden Tag fünf bis zehn Patienten. Oft sind es heikle Fälle, bei denen viel auf dem Spiel steht. Bei einer Patientin ist es eine Metastase im Rückenmark. Der Chirurg muss so präzise operieren, dass das umliegende Gewebe geschont wird, sonst droht eine Querschnittlähmung...

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: Es gibt eine neuartige Methode, die bei Hirnmetastasen Hilfe verspricht - ohne Operation und ohne Skalpell: Das so genannte Cyberknife. Ein Roboter gibt präzise und exakt berechnete Strahlen ab. Sie zerstören die Metastasen gezielt, ohne das Hirngewebe zu schädigen.

programme.title: Berufsgeheimnisse
programme.desc: Eine russische Patientin ist extra aus Moskau angereist, um sich von Hirnspezialist Prof. Peter Vajkoczy operieren zu lassen. Sie hat einen bösartigen Hirntumor. Schon an mehreren Kliniken hat sie sich Rat geholt. Professor Vajkoczy wagt sich an den schwierigen Eingriff am Gehirn.

programme.title: Die Knochen-Docs von Garmisch-Partenkirchen
programme.desc: Wenn der Alarm kommt, muss es schnell gehen. Rettungshubschrauber "Christoph 29" fliegt um die 2000 Einsätze pro Jahr. Der Helikopter gehört zum Bundeswehrkrankenhaus Hamburg. Doch die Mitarbeiter des dortigen Rettungszentrums müssen auch oft mit dem Notarztwagen ausrücken.

programme.title: Einsatz für Christoph 29
programme.desc: Einsatz für Christoph 29 - Das Luftrettungszentrum Hamburg: Wenn der Alarm kommt, muss es schnell gehen. Rettungshubschrauber "Christoph 29" fliegt um die 2000 Einsätze pro Jahr. Der Helikopter gehört zum Bundeswehrkrankenhaus Hamburg. Doch die Mitarbeiter des dortigen Rettungszentrums müssen auch oft mit dem Notarztwagen ausrücken.

programme.title: Eignungstest für Lebensretter
programme.desc: Dienst rund um die Uhr und die Bereitschaft, im Notfall die eigene Gesundheit zu riskieren. Feuerwehrmann zu sein ist ein knochenharter Job. Trotzdem bewerben sich Tausende jährlich um die Laufbahn des Lebensretters. Die Hürden sind hoch, viele scheitern an den Vorgaben. Wer es in die Vorauswahl geschafft hat, muss sich einem körperlichen Eignungstest unterziehen.

programme.title: Jede Sekunde zählt - Notärzte im Einsatz

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Possible outcomes if Kong Qui, known in the West as Confucius, had been as opportunistic and corrupt as other officials.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: Genghis Khan: The Empire of the Steppes
programme.desc: The impact the events of his childhood had on shaping the man who would become Genghis Khan, and how the Mongol invasions affected the history of Asia and the psyche of Europe.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: The possible development of scientific conversation over the last 200 years had Charles Darwin's "On the Origin of Species" never been published.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: Chernobyl: A Reactor Out of Control
programme.desc: The decisions of only a handful of individuals determined the course of the nuclear disaster at Chernobyl and the impact it would have on the world.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: Sekigahara: The Battle of the Samurais
programme.desc: Japan's internal politics and the country's response to external influences can be traced back to the choices of two warlords and a decisive battle during the Edo Period.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Albert Einstein's influence changed the face of war and the world when he chose to write to the President of the United States.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: The untimely death of the Roman Emperor of the Western Empire, and the poor decisions of the Roman Emperor of the Eastern Empire, change the fortunes of the Roman army in its battle with the Goths.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: Internet: The Origins of the Web
programme.desc: The possible outcome if the source codes for the Internet had remained with the U.S. military, rather than being released to the world.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: An exploration into what would be different in today's world if Alexander had not died at the age of 32, and had listened to advisers and returned to Macedonia instead of going on his worldwide conquest.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Speculating how things might be different if there had not been a Cold War and a space race.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: A Bus for Martin Luther King
programme.desc: Martin Luther King Jr.'s role in motivating change during the Civil Rights movement, and how the legacy of the Civil War still affects American democracy.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.sub-title: King Philippe of France and Richard the Lionheart of England
programme.desc: Questioning what might have happened if Richard the Lionheart had not been wounded, or if Philippe Auguste of France had fled the battlefield.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Possible outcomes if Kong Qui, known in the West as Confucius, had been as opportunistic and corrupt as other officials.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Action sports friends go wing-suit flying from Monte Brento in the Italian Alps, which is a great place to try new tricks in a wing suit; for a paralyzed friend from Dubai, United Arab Emirates, it is also the perfect place to keep on jumping.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Jokke Sommer, Espen Fadnes and Niccolo Porcella reunite with family members, first, in the Alps and later on the island of Sardinia, where Niccolo was raised.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Wing-suit flying on the coast of Sardinia is unexplored territory; Niccolo Porcella desperately wants to try a new line with Espen Fadnes which finishes on a beach.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Jokke Sommer has some fun in California before traveling to Alaska to go speed flying with his friend, Miles Daisher.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: The Alaskan mountains in spring are mind blowing; Jokke and his friends board a helicopter to go speed flying; it may look peaceful, but it's very dangerous.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Jokke, Niccolo and Espen travel to China, where they participate in a wingsuit flying competition, jumping from a gigantic platform.

programme.title: Modern Explorers

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: Engineers race to generate vast power from thin air: the wind; one of the world's biggest wind farms is being built in harsh conditions along the coast of England; a Norwegian team works on the world's first floating wind farm.

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: A new breed of aviators is innovating new ways to fly from clean and green electric aircraft to autonomous sky taxis.

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: Exploring the quest to produce fusion -- an ultimate energy solution that has been likened to "bottling a star."

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: The power of the oceans' tides is the last great untapped energy source on Earth; from sub-sea kites to floating platforms, teams of engineers race to perfect the technology to harness the vast flows of water.

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: Shipping companies and engineers create remarkable new machines to make their industry greener, using a resource that has moved man across the world's oceans for thousands of years: wind.

programme.title: Engineering the Future
programme.desc: The sun is the biggest source of energy in the solar system; innovators search for new ways to capture more of the sun's power and make it available through the night, everywhere.

programme.title: Wind Walkers
programme.desc: With one of their own missing, a group of friends travel to the remote Florida everglades where they discover that an ancient, malevolent curse is tracking them.

programme.title: Violet & Daisy
programme.desc: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

programme.title: False Flag
programme.desc: Sean, a sidelined CIA Officer, struggles with depression after his last Ukraine mission. Bored and yearning for action, he learns of a domestic op by Homeland Security that would put him undercover. But when he discovers it's a series of false flag attacks aimed at dismantling the US Constitution, he must act. After diplomacy fails, he resorts to sabotage and, ultimately, violence to stop it.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: After a kidnapping, a secret-agent-turned-mercenary reemerges upon learning the crime hits close to home. However, when an infamous gangster learns just who has entered the country, he goes on a bloody rampage to thwart the rescue mission.

programme.title: On The Job
programme.desc: An action-packed thriller inspired by the shocking true stories of inmates forced by prison officials to secretly carry out assassinations while on official one-day releases, and a pair of police officers who must navigate the web of corruption and lies in order to bring those guilty to justice.

programme.title: Turbo Kid
programme.desc: Set in a post apocalyptic year of 1997, this retro-futuristic and nostalgic tribute to 80’s action-adventure films follows an orphaned teenager who goes on an adventure to save his female-robot companion from the hands of an evil warlord who controls the only water supply.

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: A sheriff tries to stop the killing spree of a mute maniacal murderer who, as the result of years of medical experimentation, has the ability to self-heal.

programme.title: After Party
programme.desc: A group of social media influencers go to an afterparty in a Hollywood Hills mansion only to find themselves the target of a ruthless masked killer.

programme.title: Wind Walkers
programme.desc: With one of their own missing, a group of friends travel to the remote Florida everglades where they discover that an ancient, malevolent curse is tracking them.

programme.title: Run Baby Run
programme.desc: Diana, deaf from birth, begins her training in an idyllic rural landscape, until she comes across a mysterious runner. Hidden behind the darkness of the hood of his sweatshirt, the runner and Diana begin a small running competition that degenerates into a desperate battle for survival. Diana will have to use all her resources, wit, and willpower to survive the violent attack of her pursuer.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: When a band of brutal gangsters led by a crooked property developer make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Police Story: Lockdown
programme.desc: The highly-anticipated fifth installment of the Police Story franchise, starring Jackie Chan in a story of family ties, betrayal, and revenge.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult. Lyon then takes up the sport of bare-knuckle fighting, earning him the money to reach his destination and support his loved ones -- but with the Foreign Legion hot on his trail, will he ever find peace?

programme.title: Hobo with a Shotgun
programme.desc: A homeless vigilante blows away crooked cops and other scumbags with his trusty pump-action shotgun.

programme.title: Hobo with a Shotgun
programme.desc: A homeless vigilante blows away crooked cops and other scumbags with his trusty pump-action shotgun.

programme.title: Violet & Daisy
programme.desc: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

programme.title: Turbo Kid
programme.desc: Set in a post apocalyptic year of 1997, this retro-futuristic and nostalgic tribute to 80’s action-adventure films follows an orphaned teenager who goes on an adventure to save his female-robot companion from the hands of an evil warlord who controls the only water supply.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: After a kidnapping, a secret-agent-turned-mercenary reemerges upon learning the crime hits close to home. However, when an infamous gangster learns just who has entered the country, he goes on a bloody rampage to thwart the rescue mission.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends uncover an otherworldly object in a rural field, which they soon discover holds greater secrets than they could imagine.

programme.title: Secrets
programme.desc: After her mother's passing, Sammy, a resilient single mother, grapples with the looming threat of a breakdown while keeping her mysterious past hidden. Ava, Sammy's daughter, has hidden a desire to uncover the identity of her father, sensing his significant influence on her identity. The journey to bury her grandmother becomes Ava's chance to delve into her origins, but her exploration uncovers more than she intended to reveal.

programme.title: Day of the Comet
programme.desc: The summer of 1986. Halley’s comet races around the earth for the first time in 76 years. Three losers in a small town, believing that what they are seeing is your run-of-the-mill shooting star, each make a wish for a better life. But when their wishes are granted too literally, the neighborhood plunges into total chaos.

programme.title: Bravestorm
programme.desc: In the year 2050 mankind is extinct. The last survivors travel back in time to stop the invader, the Killgis, in a battle of giant robots.

programme.title: Listening
programme.desc: Grad students invent mind-reading technology that destroys their lives and threatens the future of free will itself.

programme.title: Assimilate (aka Replicate)
programme.desc: Best friends Zach (Joel Courtney, THE KISSING BOOTH), Randy (Calum Worthy), and Kayla (Andi Matichak, HALLOWEEN) discover that their neighbors are being killed and replaced by perfect copies of their victims. Their only chance to survive is to covertly record the invasion in a desperate attempt to warn the world.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Cosmic Conspiracy
programme.desc: There is a conspiracy to rule the world, but the truth is far stranger than fiction. Reality isn't what it seems. With UFO sightings and Alien Abductions on the rise, now is the time to awaken, and realize the biggest conspiracy of them all.

programme.title: 2036 Origin Unknown
programme.desc: After a deadly crash, mission controller Mackenzie Wilson assists an artificial intelligence system, A.R.T.I., to uncover a mysterious object under the surface of Mars that could change the future of Earth.
Two men. Living on the exact opposite side of the world. When one sleeps, the other one is awake. But when they finally meet, a simple question arises: Who is the dream and who is the dreamer?

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Idaho woman's affair with her married boss leads to a lethal confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An intruder breaks into a lawyer's home, murders his wife and blinds him; in a search for the truth, the lawyer questions his troubled son as a possible suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two double homicides committed five years apart lead police to suspect a serial killer is responsible.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a woman is abducted during her evening shift at a gift shop, her family keeps the case in the public eye for decades, until investigators finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a man claims to have found his wife dead in the bathtub, the woman's daughters suspect there may be more to the story.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When three teenage friends set out to pursue their dreams, one ends up dead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a luxury car dealer is found dead, detectives suspect one of his lovers, but lack of evidence stalls the case for a year until one clue breaks it wide open.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Idaho woman's affair with her married boss leads to a lethal confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The sister of a man who died after robbing a bank when a bomb that was placed around his neck detonated talks about the case.

programme.desc: When a model and up-and-coming YouTube celebrity turns up dead, police question her husband in the hope he can shed some light on the situation.

programme.desc: A bombshell more than a decade after the crime reignites the investigation into the death of Sarah Pagel's mother, who was killed when Sarah was seven.

programme.desc: As detectives investigate a mother of two's sudden disappearance, her friends and family reveal she feared she was being stalked.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T. if he thinks something could be going on with Liberty and Mr. Armstrong the math teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool", wants to try out.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.
